query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A Polaroid Impulse QPS instant camera with its flash unit popped up and brightly illuminated is centered against a solid black background, framed within a thin white border. The camera face features a large square lens window, two smaller rectangular windows, and branding text reading "Polaroid" and "Impulse QPS." The camera is ejecting a square instant photograph depicting a donkey standing with its head slightly lowered and turned toward the viewer against a white background. Bright white light rays radiate outward from the flash across the black backdrop, and a translucent circular light flare appears in the lower right corner of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy, analog-styled photograph of a Polaroid Impulse QPS instant camera with its flash unit popped up and brightly illuminated floats against a solid black background, framed within a thin white border. The camera face features a large square lens window, two smaller rectangular windows, and branding text reading "Polaroid" and "Impulse QPS." The camera is ejecting a square instant photograph depicting a donkey standing with its head slightly lowered and turned toward the viewer. Bright white light rays radiate outward from the flash across the black backdrop, and a translucent circular light flare appears in the lower right corner. Heavy film grain and organic surface texture overlay the entire scene, giving it a tactile, archival lo-fi quality.
